---
title: "Juluis Foyet"
image: images/PictJuluis.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/juluis-foyet-11632a212/
      target: _blank
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/foyet_juluis
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/juluis-foyet
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:foyet.julius@ubuea.cm
---

#### Education

**University of Dschang** \| Dschang, Cameroon

*M.Sc.* in Parasitology \| 2021

*B.Sc.* in Zoology \| 2019
